'''Powered light battle armor''' was one of the earliest attempts at power-assisted [[Armor/Legends|armor]] that saw use during the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]] and after. [[Dampening fields]] were installed in the armor to block the noise of servomotors, which added the side effect of shielding the wearer against extremes in sonic frequencies resulting from sonic-based weapons.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
